page_metadata.biotools__summary: Commercial platform offered by the Malaysian based Synamatix that aligns Illumina reads against a range of Refseq RNA or NCBI genome builds for a number of organisms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Commercial platform offered by the Malaysian based Synamatix that aligns Illumina reads against a range of Refseq RNA or NCBI genome builds for a number of organisms.
